productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Beige Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 29 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 14 cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas one zippered compartment, one inner zipper, a zippered seperator and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentialsTwo short straps for carrying ease and styleBrand name appliqué d on the front Two zippered pockets on the sides and one on the front for additional spacePlastic studs embellished on the front for stylingCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
